lastFrameResolveResidual.label: Derived

gpuStageAttribution.reconciliationScope: maximum final-frame resolve residual across 15 batches in the final sustained window; per-frame totals remain Derived

excludedPhases: timestamp readback excluded from CPU render samples
timestamp resolution and mapping deferred until after cadence sampling
